scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 07 (Surat al-Anfal and Surat al-Tawbah).

terms.arabic: متفق على عده / متفق على تركه
terms.note: A stock formula used to mark places where all counting authorities agree either to count a phrase as a verse ending or to omit it from the count.

terms.arabic: في ضمن عدد آي القرآن الكريم
terms.english: within the transmitted verse count of the Noble Qur'an
terms.note: Used when the author says that a particular reader or regional counting tradition included a phrase in the formal transmitted enumeration of Qur'anic verse endings.
